- Backlog Item ID: BI-260010
- Title: Implement B3 schema compatibility contract
- Persona/Actor: Frontend integrator and backend maintainer
- Value statement: For integration reliability, deliver a deterministic schema compatibility handshake and governed deprecation lifecycle so releases fail safely and predictably.
- Context: B3 compatibility decisions accepted and requires concrete backend/frontend implementation.
- Problem statement: Without canonical schema metadata and startup validation, frontend may run against incompatible schema versions and fail unpredictably.
- Expected outcome: Frontend validates compatibility at startup; backend communicates deprecations through schema and governance channels.
- Success metric(s):
  - `Query.schemaInfo` is available with required fields.
  - Frontend semver-range validation blocks incompatible startup.
  - Deprecation records exist for every planned schema removal.
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - Backend exposes `schemaInfo` with `schemaVersion`, `schemaHash`, `releasedAt`.
  - Frontend queries `schemaInfo` before normal API use and fails fast on incompatibility.
  - Deprecations include GraphQL `@deprecated` and deprecation-log entries with migration paths.
- Non-goals: Runtime fallback feature flags for incompatible schema versions.
- Constraints: GraphQL-first contract only; no separate REST compatibility endpoint.
- Dependencies: ADR-260013, REQ-OR-260002, ICR governance process.
- Risks/assumptions:
  - Risk: overly strict semver ranges may block valid rollouts.
  - Assumption: release process maintains accurate schemaVersion and deprecation metadata.
- Validation approach: Contract tests, startup behavior tests, governance artifact checks.
- Priority score: 96
- Target window: MVP foundation
- Links:
  - Requirement entry: REQ-OR-260002.md
  - ADR: ADR-260013.md
  - ICR: n/a
  - Changeset: n/a
